name: Paymo Project Management & Time Tracking API
what_it_does: All-in-one project management platform for small teams and freelancers with REST API — combining task management, time tracking, resource scheduling, invoicing, and client billing in one tool, with comprehensive API for HRIS and accounting integration.
use_cases: Creating projects and tasks from CRM opportunities via API for client work tracking
Querying time entries and generating invoice data for automated billing
Syncing Paymo project status to external dashboards via API
Managing team resource scheduling and capacity via scheduling API
Automating client invoice generation from tracked project time
not_for: Large enterprise project management with complex portfolio tracking (use Jira or MS Project)
Pure standalone invoicing without project context (use FreshBooks)
best_when: A small agency, consultancy, or freelancer team needs an all-in-one tool with API access covering projects, time tracking, and client invoicing from a single platform.
avoid_when: You need enterprise PM features, complex reporting, or tools for non-service businesses without time-based billing.

auth.notes: API key for direct access. OAuth2 for third-party app integration. Basic auth also supported (API key as username). No fine-grained scopes. User permission level inherited by API key.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 1 user, unlimited clients/projects, limited features
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter from $5.90/user/month; Small Office from $10.90/user/month; Business from $16.90/user/month
pricing.notes: Free tier for single user. Affordable for small teams. Romanian company. API access on all paid plans. Comprehensive all-in-one feature set for small agencies. Strong invoicing and expense tracking. 100,000+ users. Multi-currency invoicing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply; not publicly specified

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Comprehensive REST API covering projects, tasks, time entries, invoices, estimates, expenses, clients, and users. Multiple auth options (API key, OAuth2, Basic auth). No webhooks — polling required. Good documentation for all entities. All-in-one entity model creates rich but complex API surface.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Time entry creation not idempotent. Project and client management idempotent by ID. Invoice creation creates new documents. Read operations idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: No webhooks — polling required for all data change detection
Multiple auth methods can cause confusion — standardize on one
Invoices and estimates are distinct entities with different lifecycles
Time zone handling required for time entries across global teams

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. Romanian company — EU data residency. Multiple auth options (API key weakest, OAuth2 better). No scope granularity. Standard SaaS security for small business tool.
